name: Predaplant Bufolicula
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>捕食植物</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>プレデター・プランツ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ブフォリキュラ
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
During your Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 DARK Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as Fusion Material. You can only use this effect of "Predaplant Bufolicula" once per turn.

[ Monster Effect ] 
If this card is sent to the GY or added to your Extra Deck face-up because it was used as Fusion Material: You can add 1 face-up DARK Pendulum Monster from your Extra Deck to your hand, except "Predaplant Bufolicula". You can only use this effect of "Predaplant Bufolicula" once per turn.
pend_eff: During your Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 DARK Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as Fusion Material. You can only use this effect of "Predaplant Bufolicula" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is sent to the GY or added to your Extra Deck face-up because it was used as Fusion Material: You can add 1 face-up DARK Pendulum Monster from your Extra Deck to your hand, except "Predaplant Bufolicula". You can only use this effect of "Predaplant Bufolicula" once per turn.
eff: If this card is sent to the GY or added to your Extra Deck face-up because it was used as Fusion Material: You can add 1 face-up DARK Pendulum Monster from your Extra Deck to your hand, except "Predaplant Bufolicula". You can only use this effect of "Predaplant Bufolicula" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Activates if used as Fusion Material
Activates if sent to the Graveyard
Activates if added to the Extra Deck
Adds from Extra Deck to hand
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
